title: Malmö Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Malmö with a Z-Score of -3.29. Temperatures are significantly lower than average.
body:
The current cold snap in Malmö is causing temperatures to drop significantly, with a Score of 10.0/10 indicating extreme conditions. 
 The Level is CRITICAL, with HDD at 12.5 GG and CDD at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 59% and wind speed is 9.4 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
